title: Adding Files To Emails
excerpt: Airtable allows files to be added as attachments to email templates and sent. Monday does not and requires a log in to download a file. This is AGGRAVATING! Any options out there to help?

posts.author: FirehouseFreight (Chris Schultz)
posts.cookedHtml: Airtable allows files to be added as attachments to email templates and sent. Monday does not and requires a log in to download a file. This is AGGRAVATING! Any options out there to help?

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @FirehouseFreight
Check out EasyMails where you use files from board as a attachment and automate your mailing process.
